title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 245.360 - Pay of directors
text:
245.360.  Pay of directors. — Each director attending a meeting of said board of directors shall be entitled to receive for his services for each day actually engaged in holding meetings of said board, the same per diem and mileage as allowed by law to commissioners of county commissions for their services in holding county commission meetings.
(RSMo 1939 § 12583, A.L. 1986 H.B. 1554 Revision) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10993; 1919 § 4685; 1909 § 5748
